textByHash.d95a41d6347055286f8f888b83a5e27a141d7789: You queue-jumper! My eldest son was chosen as a sacrifice to Zulrah, but now the priests say you're going to sacrifice yourself first.
textByHash.fe6863b45cbcfbe36289eb5baab5dd1b03dfac73: The sacrifice is the greatest honour to which any of us can aspire! He was so excited to be coming face-to-face with Zulrah, and offering himself on behalf of the tribe.
textByHash.d49b6d65ad258dc9e28a9c72d92a3d8845503025: Also, I won't get the extra large ration of sacred swamp eels if my son doesn't make the sacrifice. Shame on you!
textByHash.902b44c13c40b8d50feb0dddfe7dde89f2c426e8: Quite right. Now get on with sacrificing yourself.
textByHash.5b6432d2d5b199a92ccad0c2626bc7f1aefcd606: Have you heard? My eldest son has been chosen as a sacrifice to the mighty Zulrah!
textByHash.fc55d608bebf795353fd82f353d2976ef40e5ebc: Oh, it's such an honour. He's so excited to be coming face-to-face with Zulrah, and offering himself on behalf of the tribe.
textByHash.db45169ec9f2909131ce275387ed5cc70f09461f: Also, when the sacrifice is made, his brother and I will get an extra large ration of the sacred swamp eels that Zul-Onan catches. I can't wait!
textByHash.d45369c67f29560d342c686b6bebaa38abb986e7: It's the greatest honour to which any of us can aspire! I only hope that the High Priestess will one day choose me.
textByHash.22b8bc364d1592e3faa456034fec9d6ad1c58360: The extra large ration of sacred swamp eels will be nice too.
